effects.description: Gisela overloads her mech-arms in Attack Mode for 5s, gaining 50 Energy and increasing Attack Speed by 60% and Defense by 150%.

effects.effect-name: Dealing Area Damage and Gaining Energy
effects.description: Gisela smashes the target area with her mech-arms, dealing Attack * 140% Area of Effect damage and gaining 25 Energy.

effects.effect-name: Energy Gain and Granting a Shield
effects.description: Gisela primes a mini-shield to activate on reaching 100 Energy with Attack * 190% for 3s. Each Normal Attack gains her 15 Energy.

effects.effect-name: Granting All Troops a Chance to Increase Enemy Damage Taken
effects.description: Gisela’s advanced tech increases Infantry Defense by 30%.
Gisela is a master of defensive scavenging. Infantry under Gisela’s command have a 40% chance of increasing all Troops’ Defense by 50% for 1 turn.

effects.effect-name: Infantry Troops Get Shield and Reduce Damage Taken
effects.description: Gisela provides an experimental version of her shield to all troops, granting a 40% chance of reducing Damage Taken by 50% for all troops.

exploration.ability: Gisela’s fine-tuned energy facility grants an additional 15 Energy per Normal Attack and increases shield strength by Attack * 190% on reaching 100 Energy.
exploration.name: Energy Efficiency

expedition.ability: Gisela’s forays into the field of auto-turrets enhances Defender Troops’ Attack by 15%.
expedition.name: Auto-Target
